zh.Oulton Lowe, Northwich, Cheshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭爾武爾頓 洛夫
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Wrenbury於1203年出生在英國英格蘭爾武爾頓 洛夫時，他的父親Bleythen Wrenbury45歲，母親Garneth Hulton43歲。他和Joan Cheshire至少有1個兒子。他去世於1268年在英國英格蘭爾萊波瑞享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Wrenbury was born in 1203, in Oulton Lowe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Bleythen Wrenbury, was 45 and his mother, Garneth Hulton, was 43. He had at least 1 son with Joan Cheshire. He died in 1268, in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Wrenbury est né en 1203, à Oulton Lowe, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bleythen Wrenbury, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Garneth Hulton, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan Cheshire. Il est décédé en 1268, à Wrenbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Wrenburyが1203年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオウルトン ロウで生まれた時，父Bleythen Wrenburyは45歳，母Garneth Hultonは43歳であった。彼はJoan Cheshireとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1268年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウレンブリーで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Wrenbury(이)가 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 우턴 로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bleythen Wrenbury(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Garneth Hulton(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Joan Cheshire(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 런버이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Wrenbury родился в 1203 г. в местности оултон лоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bleythen Wrenbury было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Garneth Hulton, 43. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan Cheshire. Он умер в 1268 г. в местности ренбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.
